version_description: Key of Ebm instead of D#. Its also transcribed a bit more simple that the other version. The second verse can just be played Ebm, the chord variations are not needed and really just show the movement of the one note holding the same chord. They do the same in the second part of the first verse.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Its So Hard To Say Goodbye To Yesterday

recommended.version_description: Newly revised. Includes strumming patterns and improved chord placement.

content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]
I was young and didn't have nowhere to run[/tab]
I needed to wake up and see whats in front of me
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
there has to be a better way[/tab]
[tab]                                                 [ch]Db[/ch]
sing it again a better way to show im grateful  mmm [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ebm[/ch]  [ch]Ebmadd4[/ch] [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Ebmadd4[/ch] [ch]Ebm[/ch]
mm so I though up this song to show[/tab]
my appreciation for loving me so long
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]Ab[/ch]
you dont know how much you mean to me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]    [ch]Bb7[/ch]                           [ch]Db[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
Even though the times got rough you never turned away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]
you were right there[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb7[/ch]
and i thank you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]    [ch]Bb7[/ch]                     [ch]Db[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
When i felt i had enough  you never turned away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]
you were right there[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bb7[/ch]
and i thank you[/tab]
[pre chorus]
[ch]Ebm[/ch]

Esus4 Esus4add6 Esus4add7

 6        6          6

 x        x          x

Ebsus4    Ebsus4add6     Ebsus4add7     Ebsus4add6
All through my life I knew that you'd be my world going
Ebsus4    Ebsus4add6     Ebsus4add7     Ebsus4add6
everywhere i go things you taught me they would show
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
so many times and changes to see me through[/tab]
you know I couldn't have survived without you, you
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]
and so I thought up this song to show my appreciation[/tab]
for lovin me so long
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]Ab[/ch]
you dont know how much you mean to me[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]
you were right there[/tab]
